features.name: Project scaffold
features.description: Remix app with Tailwind, Prisma, shadcn/ui, env stubs

features.name: Database schema
features.description: Supabase PostgreSQL + Prisma ORM. Prisma datasource needs two URLs: DATABASE_URL (Connection Pooler, port 6543) and DIRECT_URL (direct connection, port 5432 — required for migrations). 8 Prisma models: PrepUnit, TierUnitSequence, QBankUnlocks, DirectionRef, Teacher, StudentPath, StudentUnitProgress, StudentAttempt. Teacher: clerkUserId + teacherCode for EC auth. StudentPath: clerkUserId for Clerk link, no exam_date. StudentAttempt: one row per item-attempt (fine granularity). StudentUnitProgress: current_phase enum = p0 / p1 / p2. Note: direction_ref and qbank_unlocks have no FKs by design (lookup table and denormalized Q Bank questions).

features.name: Clerk auth integration
features.description: Email/password + OAuth, session management, webhook for DB sync

features.name: Data ingestion
features.description: Import prep-unit JSON from Lab, write verbatim to PrepUnit, TierUnitSequence, QBankUnlocks, and DirectionRef tables (all 4 Lab-written tables). Pure write — no transformation or logic.

features.name: Onboarding flow
features.description: Tier selection (50/80 units), teacher code entry, path assignment + content_version lock. No exam date.

features.name: Dashboard
features.description: Student home: unit list (locked/in-progress/complete) + Question Bank entry point. Path complete state when all units done.

features.name: P0 — Cold essay
features.description: L4W cold write on model essay question. 40-min countdown. No scaffold, no peek. Artifact 1 sent to EC immediately on submit. Save point.

features.name: Peek modal component
features.description: Reusable modal showing: essay text (colour-coded by lexical type), PoV cards (human-readable direction label, summary, topic sentence, blog link), lexical items panel. Available throughout all of P1 (L4M through L2F) with no rate limit. Not available in P0, P2 L4W, or Question Bank.

features.name: MCQ practices
features.description: L4M, L3M, L2M, L1M. One question at a time, 5 options. Peek available (no rate limit). Pattern A per-item retry: wrong answer shows red X indicator (no correct answer revealed), V2 auto-loads immediately. Retry cycle: V1 → V2 → V1 (2 distractor sets only). After 3 failures: forced advance, failed_advanced: true on that item.

features.name: Scramble practices
features.description: L1S/L2S click-to-place word bank. L3S/L4S drag-to-order. Peek available. Pattern A per-arrangement retry. Same items reload on retry. After 3 failures: forced advance.

features.name: Fill practices
features.description: L1F: POS hints + similar_phrases always visible, no word bank, case-insensitive match, peek available, Pattern A per-section retry. L2F: hint_sentences visible, no pass/fail, always advances on submit, output silently discarded, no retry versions. Both are the 9th and 10th practices of P1.

features.name: P2 — Applying write
features.description: L4W on model essay question (same as P0). Collapsible: lexical items panel, syntax patterns panel. No peek. 40-min countdown. No pass/fail — always advances. Submission = unit gate. Artifact 2 sent to EC. Save point.

features.name: Unit completion
features.description: Unit complete screen after L4W submit. Next unit unlocks (or path complete screen if last unit). Q Bank unlock notification: show which new questions were added. Buttons: Go to Question Bank / Next Unit.

features.name: Educator Console
features.description: Teacher auth, student list filtered by teacher_code. Per completed unit: Artifact 1 (P0 cold essay) + Artifact 2 (L4W post-encoding essay) — both on same question. Numbered Free Practice artifacts from Q Bank. Signals: time per practice, total accumulated time, pass/fail, failed_advanced. No peek_count.

features.name: Question Bank
features.description: P3 free practice. Three question states: attempted / unlocked / locked (shows unlock trigger unit). Free L4W write on any unlocked question. 40-min countdown. No scaffold, no peek, no hints. Submit → Numbered Free Practice artifact to EC. No gate, no pass/fail. Student can re-attempt same question — each submit creates a new numbered artifact.

features.name: Arcjet security
features.description: Rate limiting, bot detection, XSS/SQLi shield
